title: Development Data Partnership Text Metadata
description: A text metadata schema leveraging multiple standards for a low-resource language AI library.

@type.description: Type of the top-level resource. Fixed to sc:Dataset.

dct:conformsTo.description: Declares conformance to Croissant 1.0 specification. If using RAI properties, also include conformance to Croissant RAI 1.0.

sc:identifier.title: Identifier
sc:identifier.description: Primary identifier for the dataset (e.g., internal ID or persistent handle).

ddi:altID.title: Alternate Identifier(s)
ddi:altID.description: Identifiers other than the primary ID (e.g., secondary handle, legacy code, DOI string).

bibo:subtitle.title: Subtitle
bibo:subtitle.description: Subtitle of the dataset or work.

sc:description.title: Description
sc:description.description: Summary of the dataset contents and purpose.

sc:url.title: Landing Page URL
sc:url.description: Landing page for the dataset (public URL).

sc:version.title: Version
sc:version.description: Version label. Accepts SemVer (with optional 'v' prefix, 2–3 segments, pre-release/build) or Calendar Versioning (YYYY[-.|.]MM[[-.|.]DD] or YYYY).

oneOf.title: Calendar version (YYYY, YYYY-MM, YYYY-MM-DD; '.' also allowed)

sc:datePublished.title: Date Published
sc:datePublished.description: Date when the dataset was first published.

sc:keywords.title: Keywords
sc:keywords.description: Keywords or tags associated with the dataset.

dcat:theme.title: Dataset Themes
dcat:theme.description: High-level categories or subjects describing the dataset. Use controlled vocabulary URIs where possible.

oneOf.description: URI identifying a concept in a controlled vocabulary (e.g., EuroVoc, GEMET, OECD).
Free-text theme name if no URI is available.

dcat:themeTaxonomy.title: Theme Taxonomy
dcat:themeTaxonomy.description: URI of the controlled vocabulary or taxonomy defining the dataset themes (e.g., EuroVoc, GEMET, OECD Subject Vocabulary).

sc:dateCreated.title: Date Created
sc:dateCreated.description: Date when the dataset was created.

sc:dateModified.title: Date Modified
sc:dateModified.description: Last modified timestamp for the dataset record.

cr:isLiveDataset.title: Is Live Dataset
cr:isLiveDataset.description: Whether the dataset is actively updated (true) or static (false).

cr:citeAs.title: Cite As
cr:citeAs.description: Preferred citation for the dataset (URL, DOI, or formatted text).

bibo:isbn.title: ISBN
bibo:isbn.description: International Standard Book Number (ISBN-10 or ISBN-13).

sc:isBasedOn.title: Is Based On
sc:isBasedOn.description: Sources or datasets this dataset is based on (links or note).

sc:audience.title: Intended Audience
sc:audience.description: Intended audience or user group for the dataset.

@type.description: Type of object representing the intended audience.

sc:geographicArea.description: Geographic area or region of the intended audience.

olac:discourseType.title: Discourse Type
olac:discourseType.description: Genre or discourse style of the content (e.g., conversation, narrative, interview).

olac:subjectLanguage.title: Subject Language(s)
olac:subjectLanguage.description: Language(s) represented or studied in the dataset, using ISO 639-3 or BCP-47 codes.

sc:inLanguage.title: Language(s)
sc:inLanguage.description: Language(s) used to describe or present the dataset, following BCP-47 tags.

sc:creator.title: Creator
sc:creator.description: Organisation/team or person(s) that created the dataset.

sc:publisher.title: Publisher
sc:publisher.description: Publisher of the dataset or work.

sc:editor.title: Editor(s)
sc:editor.description: Editor or editors responsible for the work.

sc:contributor.title: Contributor(s)
sc:contributor.description: People or organisations that contributed to the dataset.

sc:contactPoint.title: Contact Point(s)
sc:contactPoint.description: Contact details for enquiries or access requests.

sc:telephone.description: Telephone number in E.164 format: '+' followed by 8–15 digits.

sc:provider.title: Provider
sc:provider.description: Organisation that provides or hosts the dataset.

sc:funder.title: Funder
sc:funder.description: Organisation or person providing financial support for the dataset.

sc:sourceOrganization.title: Source Organisation
sc:sourceOrganization.description: Organisation that sourced or collected the data.

sc:license.title: License
sc:license.description: Use an SPDX ID/expression, a LicenseRef for proprietary terms, or a license URL.

sc:copyrightHolder.title: Copyright Holder
sc:copyrightHolder.description: Owner of copyright in the dataset.

sc:usageInfo.title: Usage Information
sc:usageInfo.description: Permitted use details or link to usage guidelines.

sc:conditionsOfAccess.title: Conditions of Access
sc:conditionsOfAccess.description: Conditions or limitations for accessing this dataset.

ddpv:piiScreening.title: Contains PII
ddpv:piiScreening.description: Set true if any file contains personally identifiable information.

ddpv:piiScreeningMethodOther.title: If 'other', please specify
ddpv:piiScreeningMethodOther.description: Free-text description when 'other' method is selected.

ddpv:piiNotes.title: PII Notes
ddpv:piiNotes.description: Short note describing the type of PII present (if any).

ddpv:sensitiveContent.title: Contains Sensitive Content
ddpv:sensitiveContent.description: Set true if content is restricted/classified or potentially harmful.

ddpv:sensitiveNotes.title: Sensitive Content Notes
ddpv:sensitiveNotes.description: Type(s) of sensitive content (e.g., hate speech, military data).

ddpv:attribution.title: Attribution Required
ddpv:attribution.description: Whether users must credit the source when using the dataset.

ddpv:thirdPartyRestrictions.title: Third-Party Restrictions
ddpv:thirdPartyRestrictions.description: Any third-party IP or usage restrictions.

ddpv:retentionPolicy.title: Retention Policy
ddpv:retentionPolicy.description: Retention policy applicable to the dataset.

rai:dataCollection.title: Data Collection
rai:dataCollection.description: Description of how the data was collected, including method, setting, and sources.

rai:dataCollectionType.title: Data Collection Type
rai:dataCollectionType.description: Type or method of data collection.

rai:dataCollectionRawData.title: Raw Data Source
rai:dataCollectionRawData.description: Source of the raw data before any processing or transformation.

rai:dataCollectionTimeFrameStart.title: Collection Start Date
rai:dataCollectionTimeFrameStart.description: Start date/time when data collection began.

rai:dataCollectionTimeFrameEnd.title: Collection End Date
rai:dataCollectionTimeFrameEnd.description: End date/time when data collection was completed.

rai:dataUseCases.title: Data Use Cases
rai:dataUseCases.description: Intended use cases for the dataset.

rai:dataBiases.title: Data Biases
rai:dataBiases.description: Known or potential biases in the dataset (sampling, selection, representation, etc.).

rai:dataLimitations.title: Data Limitations
rai:dataLimitations.description: Known limitations, gaps, risks, or caveats that users should be aware of.

rai:dataSocialImpact.title: Social Impact
rai:dataSocialImpact.description: Description of the anticipated or potential social impact of using this dataset.

rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan.title: Release and Maintenance
rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan.description: How the dataset will be maintained, updated, and released over time.

rai:dataAnnotationProtocol.title: Annotation Protocol
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol.description: Protocol or guidelines used for data annotation/labeling.

rai:dataAnnotationPlatform.title: Annotation Platform
rai:dataAnnotationPlatform.description: Platform or tool used for annotation.

rai:dataAnnotationAnalysis.title: Annotation Quality Analysis
rai:dataAnnotationAnalysis.description: Analysis of annotation quality, inter-rater reliability, or quality control measures.

rai:annotationsPerItem.title: Annotations Per Item
rai:annotationsPerItem.description: Number of annotations collected per data item.

rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol.title: Preprocessing Protocol
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol.description: Steps taken to preprocess, clean, or filter the data.

rai:dataManipulationProtocol.title: Data Manipulation Protocol
rai:dataManipulationProtocol.description: Description of how data was transformed, augmented, or manipulated.

dqv:hasQualityMeasurement.title: Quality measurements (dataset-level)
dqv:hasQualityMeasurement.description: Aggregate technical/quality metrics for the dataset; each item states what was measured, its value, units, and how it was aggregated (e.g., mean).

@type.description: Fixed type for DQV quality measurements.

dqv:isMeasurementOf.description: What is being measured (DDPV custom terms for text datasets).

schema:description.description: Free-text clarification of scope/aggregation, e.g., 'Total number of unique tokens across all documents'.

ddpv:aggregationType.description: How the dataset-level value was derived.

sc:isReferencedBy.title: Is Referenced By
sc:isReferencedBy.description: External works (web pages, papers) that cite or reference this dataset.

dct:subjectOf.title: Subject Of
dct:subjectOf.description: External resources that have this dataset as their subject.

sc:mentions.title: Mentions
sc:mentions.description: Mentions of the dataset (text or URLs).

sc:measurementTechnique.title: Measurement Technique
sc:measurementTechnique.description: Measurement or sampling technique used, named or as a URI.

sc:interactionStatistic.title: Interaction Statistics
sc:interactionStatistic.description: User interaction counters related to the dataset (downloads, views, likes).

sc:userInteractionCount.description: Non-negative count of interactions in the period.

sc:startTime.description: Start time of the interaction counting window.

sc:endTime.description: End time of the interaction counting window.

prov:activity.title: Activity
prov:activity.description: IRI of the generating activity or workflow. Provide a label only as supplemental metadata.

prov:used.title: Used
prov:used.description: Inputs (data, models, software) referenced by IRI(s).

prov:wasDerivedFrom.title: Was Derived From
prov:wasDerivedFrom.description: Source datasets or resources from which this dataset was derived.

prov:wasAttributedTo.title: Was Attributed To
prov:wasAttributedTo.description: Agent(s) (URI) to whom the dataset is attributed.

prov:wasAssociatedWith.title: Was Associated With
prov:wasAssociatedWith.description: Agent IRI(s) involved. Prefer persistent IRIs; include labels only as supplemental fields.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags as object with tag names as keys. Each tag can optionally have a tag_group property. Example: {'NLP': {'tag_group': 'domain'}, 'English': {'tag_group': 'language'}}

additional.title: Additional fields
additional.description: Section for custom metadata; avoid adding custom fields at the top level.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.description: Canonical list of FileObjects or FileSets that make up the dataset.

cr:recordSet.title: Record Set
cr:recordSet.description: Defines the logical table of data records within the dataset. Each RecordSet describes how records are extracted from source files, their structure (fields), and relationships to FileObjects or FileSets. A dataset may include multiple RecordSets for different data modalities or sources.

FileObject.$comment: Text file metadata optimized for ML/AI workflows with flat structure.

@type.description: Fixed type for a single distributed file.

@id.description: Local identifier for this file object.

sc:contentUrl.description: Resolvable URL from which the file can be accessed or downloaded.

sc:encodingFormat.description: MIME type of the file (e.g., text/plain, application/json, text/csv, text/xml).

sc:contentSize.description: File size as number of bytes or a human-readable string (e.g., '42 MB').

sc:sameAs.description: Canonical URI(s) where this file is also referenced.

dct:title.title: Article Title
dct:title.description: Title of the article associated with this file.

sc:author.title: Author(s)
sc:author.description: The author(s) of the article or creative work associated with this dataset.

sc:inLanguage.description: Primary language of the document (BCP-47 or ISO 639-3 code).

dct:subject.title: Subject / Text Domain
dct:subject.description: The topic, subject, domain, or genre of the text content (e.g., 'news', 'fiction', 'scientific', 'conversational', 'government'). Can be free text or controlled vocabulary URIs.

dct:type.title: Document Type
dct:type.description: Type of document or resource. Prefer controlled term IRIs.

dcat:theme.title: File Themes (Sectors)
dcat:theme.description: High-level categories or subjects describing the dataset. Use controlled vocabulary URIs where possible.

oneOf.description: URI identifying a concept in a controlled vocabulary (e.g., EuroVoc, GEMET, OECD).
Free-text theme name if no URI is available.

dcat:themeTaxonomy.title: Theme Taxonomy
dcat:themeTaxonomy.description: URI of the controlled vocabulary or taxonomy defining the dataset themes (e.g., EuroVoc, GEMET, OECD Subject Vocabulary).

sc:keywords.title: Keywords
sc:keywords.description: Keywords or tags associated with the file.

sc:datePublished.title: Date Published
sc:datePublished.description: Date when the dataset was first published.

sc:numberOfPages.title: Number of Pages
sc:numberOfPages.description: The number of pages in the document (Schema.org standard property). Applicable to paginated documents like PDFs, books, reports, etc.

sc:wordCount.title: Word Count
sc:wordCount.description: The number of words in the text of the document (Schema.org standard property).

ddpv:charCount.description: Total number of characters in the document.

ddpv:tokenCount.description: Total number of tokens in the document.

ddpv:perplexityScore.description: A standard measure of how well a model predicts text. (lower = more aligned with learned patterns).

@type.description: Fixed type for a grouped set of file objects.

sc:encodingFormat.description: Common MIME type shared by files in the set.
